productDisplayName: Disney Kids Girl's Denim Minnie Dark Blue Skirt
description: CompositionDark blue denim skirt made of 100% cotton with elastic waist band and denim bow, vertical panels in the front and pink embroidery and applique of Minnie MouseWash care1. Machine wash in cold water with gentle cycle using mild detergent2. Wash dark colours seperately3. Do not bleach4. Do not soak or wring5. Dry inside-out6. Do not tumble dry7. Do not iron on print and studsFittingComfort FitThis cute Minnie Mouse denim skirt from disney is perfect for your little princess. The appliqued Minnie graphic and butterfly and beetle embroidery on the denim skirt add a tinge of playfulness to the skirt. The elasticated waist ensures the dress stays in plays while your little girl enjoys all the fun and frolick, and the dark denim fabric will keep her comfy while she romps around in the park or runs around with her friends. The skirt can be teamed with a tee or fancy top of her choice.
